jobs.title: Business Intelligence Analyst
jobs.summary:
Savon Nexo is seeking a Business Intelligence Analyst to help retail and small-to-mid-sized business clients turn operational data into clear, actionable insights. This role will focus on building dashboards, reporting systems, KPI trackers, and business performance summaries that support smarter decisions across sales, inventory, pricing, promotions, vendors, and customer behavior.

The ideal candidate should be comfortable working with business users, understanding operational questions, cleaning and organizing data, and translating raw information into meaningful visual reports. This position is well-suited for someone with strong analytical thinking, attention to detail, and experience using tools such as Power BI, Excel, SQL, and data visualization platforms.

Key Responsibilities:

Build dashboards and reports for sales, inventory, pricing, marketing, and operational KPIs
Analyze business performance trends and identify actionable insights
Translate business questions into clear charts, metrics, and reporting logic
Clean, organize, and validate data from POS, ecommerce, vendor, and internal systems
Support forecasting, competitor monitoring, promotion tracking, and margin analysis
Work with business teams to improve reporting accuracy and decision-making

jobs.title: AI Solutions Engineer
jobs.summary: Design and ship AI-powered automations and insight tools for our SMB clients. Strong Python, LLM, and prompt engineering skills required.

jobs.title: Web Solutions Developer
jobs.summary: Build and maintain client websites — landing pages, ecommerce content, and product visibility tooling.
